package fixture

import "context"

// Direct-literal Operation(): serverbound handler pattern where Operation()
// returns a string literal directly (no const indirection).
type DirectLiteral struct {
	n uint32
}

func (m DirectLiteral) Operation() string {
	return "DirectLiteralHandle"
}

func (m DirectLiteral) Encode(_ interface{}, _ context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		w.WriteInt(m.n)
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}
